name: Turkey and Pecan Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the turkey with mixed vegetable seasoning.
2. In a skillet, melt half of the butter and brown the turkey. Place the turkey in an ovenproof casserole dish with the lid.
3. In the same skillet, sauté garlic and scallions.
4. Add brandy and wine; increase heat and boil for about 1 minute.
5. Reduce heat to low and whisk in tomato paste and flour until smooth.
6. Cook, stirring until smooth. Add mushrooms and broth.
7. Pour the sauce over the turkey in the casserole dish.
8. Add pecans.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until the turkey is tender.
10. Remove from the oven. Spoon about 2 cups of turkey sauce into a bowl; stir in sour cream; return to the casserole, stirring until thoroughly combined.
11. Return to the oven and bake covered for an additional 10 minutes.
12. Sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.
